products.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones

products.name: JBL Charge 5 Portable Speaker

products.description: Made from 100% GOTS certified organic cotton. Pre-shrunk, breathable, and incredibly soft. Available in 12 colors. Fair trade certified.

products.name: Hydro Flask Wide Mouth 32oz

products.name: Dyson V15 Detect Cordless Vacuum
products.description: Laser reveals microscopic dust. Piezo sensor counts and sizes particles. Up to 60 minutes of run time. Whole-machine HEPA filtration.

products.name: Levi's 501 Original Fit Jeans
products.description: The original blue jean since 1873. Sits at the waist, regular fit through thigh, straight leg. Button fly. 100% cotton non-stretch denim.

products.name: CeraVe Moisturizing Cream

products.name: LEGO Creator Expert Bonsai Tree

products.name: Yoga Mat Premium 6mm

products.name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 6Qt

products.name: Ray-Ban Aviator Classic Sunglasses

products.name: Kindle Paperwhite 6.8" Display

products.name: Patagonia Better Sweater Jacket

products.name: Atomic Habits by James Clear
